Defendant California Franchise Tax Board's motion to stay action pending the Court of Appeal's decision in Paula Trust v. California Franchise Tax Board, No. A154691 (First App. Dist., Div. 3), is granted. The action is stayed until the Court of Appeal's decision in that case becomes final without either party filing a timely petition for review in the California Supreme Court or, if such a petition for review is filed, until the Supreme Court has acted on the petition for review. If review is granted, either party may request the Court to continue the stay.
